form.formComment: Two back was well beaten into seventh after a quick start, behind Dashing at this track over 2138m in a 4yo+ No NR on March 21 at $41. Then a handy effort when beaten by 3.5 m finishing third after showing early speed, behind Attachment at this track over 1660m in a 4yo+ No NR on March 28 at $6. Fitter again and should get his chance from this draw.

form.formComment: First up. At the last run he was driven from back in the field when 8th (Fr2) over 1660m after showing early pace at this track was 6th-11.1m on the pegs at the bell, beaten 15 m by Captain Shuffles (1:55.50) in No NR on November 29 at $5. Four-time fresh winner so can open the campaign with a forward performance.
